'''3T-RNE''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that worked for the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency.<ref name="Hasbro">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Star Tours (toy line)|pack=3T-RNE|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/sw053trne.asp}}</ref> A broken droid, he could be found waiting for [[R3-D3/Legends|R3-D3]] and another droid to be repaired.<ref name="ST" />

==Behind the scenes==
This droid can be seen at the [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] ride in Orlando, Florida.<ref name="ST" /> [[Hasbro]] released 3T-RNE as an exclusive ''Star Tours'' action figure.<ref name="Hasbro" />
